# openshift_catalog_source (Resource)

Manages an OperatorHub CatalogSource on an OpenShift cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `display_name` (String)
- `kubeconfig` (String) Path to kubeconfig. Overrides provider setting.
- `namespace` (String)
- `poll_interval` (String) Poll interval for RegistryPoll update strategy (e.g. 30m).
- `publisher` (String)
- `update_strategy` (String) Update strategy: 'RegistryPoll' or 'None'.
